entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: The cultivated crop being studied for plant height traits.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: An important agronomic trait associated with soybean yield and quality.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic trait associated with plant height in soybean.

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: An agronomic trait associated with plant height in soybean.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method performed to identify SNPs significantly associated with plant height.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Genetic markers found to be significantly associated with plant height across environments.

entities.name: NJAU 355 K SOY SNP ARRAY
entities.description: The genotyping tool used to identify SNPs in soybean accessions.

entities.name: STABLE QTLS
entities.description: Genomic regions flanking consistent SNPs considered as stable quantitative trait loci.

entities.name: DT1
entities.description: A prioritized candidate gene controlling plant height.

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci in a genomic region.

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE BLOCK
entities.description: A group of SNPs in strong linkage disequilibrium forming specific haplotypes.

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: Specific genetic variations (Hap-A to Hap-E) associated with plant height.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup which is pivotal for crop improvement.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits using genetic resources.

entities.name: NATURAL POPULATIONS
entities.description: Precious genetic resources used for the targeted utilization of quantitative traits.
